data.content: Pushed cf24e048 to origin/main. Clarified the single dispatch-level Swap Agent control as a global replacement tool, added pools-section guidance that replacements happen via that one shared control, and added a regression test that locks the swap UI to Dispatch instead of per-step pool editors. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (warnings only, pre-existing), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
